Vozinha.bio: Veteran Cape Verdean goalkeeper who has been a mainstay between the posts for over a decade. Born in Praia, he built his career in Portuguese football with Gil Vicente.
Vozinha.playingStyle: Commanding shot-stopper with excellent reflexes and vocal organization of the backline
Vozinha.worldCup2026Role: Starting goalkeeper and veteran leader for Cape Verde's historic first World Cup campaign
Vozinha.notableFact: One of the oldest players in the squad at 40, his longevity and consistency have made him a national team legend

Steven Fortes.bio: Experienced center-back who has spent the bulk of his career in French football, playing for Lens in Ligue 1. Cape Verdean-born with Portuguese heritage, he chose to represent the Blue Sharks.
Steven Fortes.playingStyle: Strong, composed central defender comfortable with the ball at his feet and aerially dominant
Steven Fortes.worldCup2026Role: First-choice center-back and key figure in Cape Verde's defensive organization
Steven Fortes.notableFact: His experience in Ligue 1 with Lens makes him one of the highest-profile defenders in Cape Verdean football history

Roberto Lopes.bio: Irish-born center-back of Cape Verdean descent who made headlines by choosing to represent the Blue Sharks internationally. A longtime stalwart at Shamrock Rovers in the League of Ireland.
Roberto Lopes.playingStyle: Tough, no-nonsense central defender with strong tackling and commitment
Roberto Lopes.worldCup2026Role: Experienced squad center-back providing depth and reliability at the back
Roberto Lopes.notableFact: Born and raised in Dublin, Ireland, he earned his first Cape Verde cap after being scouted through the diaspora

Stopira.bio: Veteran central defender and former captain who has been a pillar of Cape Verdean football for many years. Known by his single name, he has played extensively in Eastern European leagues with FC Sheriff.
Stopira.playingStyle: Rugged, physical center-back who leads by example with tough challenges and aerial dominance
Stopira.worldCup2026Role: Senior squad defender and locker room leader bringing invaluable big-game experience
Stopira.notableFact: With 55 caps, he is one of the most capped players in Cape Verdean history and has Champions League experience with FC Sheriff

Jeffry Fortes.bio: Dutch-born left-back of Cape Verdean descent who plies his trade in the Eredivisie with Fortuna Sittard. He brings European league experience to Cape Verde's fullback options.
Jeffry Fortes.playingStyle: Overlapping left-back who combines defensive solidity with attacking forays down the flank
Jeffry Fortes.worldCup2026Role: Starting left-back tasked with providing width and defensive cover on the left side
Jeffry Fortes.notableFact: Part of the Cape Verdean diaspora in the Netherlands, he chose the Blue Sharks over potential Dutch youth representation

Kenny Rocha.bio: Central midfielder who has been a consistent performer for both club and country. Playing alongside Vozinha at Gil Vicente in Portugal, he brings Portuguese league savvy to the national team.
Kenny Rocha.playingStyle: Box-to-box midfielder with good passing range and the stamina to cover ground for 90 minutes
Kenny Rocha.worldCup2026Role: Key midfield engine providing balance between defense and attack in Cape Verde's system
Kenny Rocha.notableFact: A product of Portuguese football's lower divisions who worked his way up to become a regular international

Ryan Mendes.bio: Experienced right winger and one of Cape Verde's most capped players with 50 appearances. He has had a well-traveled career spanning Portuguese, French, and Saudi Arabian football.
Ryan Mendes.playingStyle: Tricky, direct winger who enjoys taking on defenders one-on-one with pace and skill
Ryan Mendes.worldCup2026Role: Experienced wide attacker who provides a creative outlet and set-piece delivery on the right flank
Ryan Mendes.notableFact: With 50 caps and 8 goals, he is among the all-time leading scorers for Cape Verde

Jamiro Monteiro.bio: Cape Verdean attacking midfielder who became a fan favorite in MLS with Philadelphia Union. Born in Rotterdam to Cape Verdean parents, he brings European and American league experience.
Jamiro Monteiro.playingStyle: Creative playmaker with excellent vision, technical skill, and an eye for the final pass
Jamiro Monteiro.worldCup2026Role: Starting number 10 and chief creator, the player around whom Cape Verde's attacking play revolves
Jamiro Monteiro.notableFact: Born in the Netherlands, he chose Cape Verde over Curacao and has become one of the team's most valuable assets in MLS

Garry Rodrigues.bio: Dynamic left winger who has enjoyed a prolific international career with 45 caps and 12 goals for the Blue Sharks. He had a standout stint at Galatasaray in Turkey before moving to Cyprus.
Garry Rodrigues.playingStyle: Pacey, direct winger who cuts inside from the left onto his stronger right foot to shoot or create
Garry Rodrigues.worldCup2026Role: Key attacking threat on the left wing with the responsibility of being Cape Verde's primary goal-scoring winger
Garry Rodrigues.notableFact: His time at Galatasaray in the Turkish Super Lig made him the highest-profile Cape Verdean club player at the time

Jânio Bikel.bio: Defensive midfielder who plays in MLS for the Vancouver Whitecaps. Born in Guinea-Bissau and raised in Portugal, he chose to represent Cape Verde on the international stage.
Jânio Bikel.playingStyle: Strong defensive midfielder who excels at breaking up opposition play and recycling possession quickly
Jânio Bikel.worldCup2026Role: Midfield anchor providing defensive protection in front of the back line
Jânio Bikel.notableFact: Wears the number 10 shirt despite playing as a defensive midfielder, reflecting his importance to the team's structure

Jovane Cabral.bio: Talented young winger who came through the famed Sporting CP academy in Lisbon. Despite injury setbacks, his raw talent makes him one of Cape Verde's most exciting attacking prospects.
Jovane Cabral.playingStyle: Skillful inverted winger who drifts inside from the left, combining quick feet with an ability to shoot from distance
Jovane Cabral.worldCup2026Role: Impact attacker who can change games off the bench or in the starting lineup with his individual quality
Jovane Cabral.notableFact: Developed at Sporting CP alongside the likes of Bruno Fernandes and came close to moves to top European clubs before injuries intervened

Marcio Rosa.bio: Backup goalkeeper playing in the Portuguese top flight with Casa Pia. He provides reliable competition and depth behind the first-choice keeper.
Marcio Rosa.playingStyle: Agile goalkeeper with good reflexes and comfortable playing out from the back
Marcio Rosa.worldCup2026Role: Second or third-choice goalkeeper providing squad depth
Marcio Rosa.notableFact: Competes in the Portuguese Primeira Liga, one of several Cape Verdean goalkeepers plying their trade in Portugal

Dylan Tavares.bio: Young right-back developing in Portuguese football with Rio Ave. He represents the next generation of Cape Verdean defenders making their mark in European leagues.
Dylan Tavares.playingStyle: Athletic right-back who contributes in both phases, offering pace in recovery and energy in attack
Dylan Tavares.worldCup2026Role: Backup right-back option who can also feature as a wing-back in tactical adjustments
Dylan Tavares.notableFact: At just 27, he is part of a younger generation pushing for first-team opportunities on the World Cup stage

Nuno Borges.bio: Central midfielder who plays for Moreirense in the Portuguese top flight. A steady, reliable presence in the middle of the park for both club and country.
Nuno Borges.playingStyle: Neat, tidy central midfielder who keeps play ticking with simple, effective passing
Nuno Borges.worldCup2026Role: Midfield squad option who can slot into various midfield roles when called upon
Nuno Borges.notableFact: Has built his career entirely within the Portuguese football pyramid, gaining steady international recognition

Carlos Graca.bio: Young center-back from Sporting CP's B team, representing Cape Verde's investment in developing future defensive talent through the Portuguese football system.
Carlos Graca.playingStyle: Tall, composed defender who reads the game well and is comfortable stepping out with the ball
Carlos Graca.worldCup2026Role: Young defensive depth option gaining World Cup squad experience for the future
Carlos Graca.notableFact: Developed in Sporting CP's youth system, one of the most prestigious academies in Portugal

Patrick Andrade.bio: Experienced central midfielder who plays in the Saudi Pro League for Al-Taawoun. With 40 caps, he is one of the most relied-upon midfielders in Cape Verde's pool.
Patrick Andrade.playingStyle: Intelligent midfielder with good passing ability and the tactical awareness to control the tempo of matches
Patrick Andrade.worldCup2026Role: Key midfield contributor who can start or rotate, bringing leadership and composure to the engine room
Patrick Andrade.notableFact: His 40 caps make him one of the most experienced midfielders in Cape Verde's squad

Leandro Brito.bio: Right-back who plays in the Portuguese top flight with Casa Pia. A dependable defender with 20 caps for the national team who provides experience at fullback.
Leandro Brito.playingStyle: Disciplined right-back who prioritizes defensive solidity and reliable positioning
Leandro Brito.worldCup2026Role: Experienced backup right-back and reliable squad rotation option
Leandro Brito.notableFact: Has spent his entire professional career in Portuguese football, becoming a trusted international regular

Kelvin Pires.bio: Young winger plying his trade in Portugal's second division with Mafra. At just 23, he is one of the youngest and most promising attackers in the Cape Verde squad.
Kelvin Pires.playingStyle: Quick, direct winger with pace to burn and a willingness to run at defenders
Kelvin Pires.worldCup2026Role: Young squad member who can provide late-game attacking energy off the bench
Kelvin Pires.notableFact: One of the youngest players in the squad, representing Cape Verde's emerging generation of talent

Willy Semedo.bio: Veteran defensive midfielder with 30 caps who plays for Vizela in the Portuguese top flight. A trusted shield in front of the defense who breaks up opposition attacks.
Willy Semedo.playingStyle: Combative, defensive-minded midfielder who reads danger well and makes timely interceptions
Willy Semedo.worldCup2026Role: Experienced midfield enforcer available for defensive duties when the team needs to protect a lead
Willy Semedo.notableFact: His 30 caps and years of Portuguese league experience make him a valuable veteran presence

Julio Tavares.bio: Cape Verde's all-time leading scorer with 16 goals in 45 caps. The veteran striker has spent most of his career in French football, most notably with Dijon in Ligue 1 and Ligue 2.
Julio Tavares.playingStyle: Tall target striker who excels in the air and provides a focal point for crosses and long balls into the box
Julio Tavares.worldCup2026Role: Veteran center-forward who serves as the primary target man and penalty box presence
Julio Tavares.notableFact: Cape Verde's all-time top scorer, his 16 international goals are a national record

Bruno Varela.bio: Goalkeeper who has played at the highest levels of Portuguese and European football, including a spell at Benfica. Now at Vitoria Guimaraes, he chose Cape Verde over Portugal at international level.
Bruno Varela.playingStyle: Technically excellent goalkeeper with strong shot-stopping and confidence in handling
Bruno Varela.worldCup2026Role: High-quality backup goalkeeper who could challenge for the starting spot
Bruno Varela.notableFact: Came through the Benfica academy and once served as backup to Jan Oblak at the Lisbon giants

Djaniny.bio: Prolific striker known by his single name who made his reputation scoring goals in Liga MX with Santos Laguna and in the Saudi Pro League. A proven international goalscorer with 8 goals in 30 caps.
Djaniny.playingStyle: Clinical finisher with sharp movement in the box and the ability to score with both feet and his head
Djaniny.worldCup2026Role: Experienced forward option who can lead the line or provide a poaching threat off the bench
Djaniny.notableFact: Won the Liga MX scoring title with Santos Laguna, becoming the first Cape Verdean to top-score in a major football league

Gilson Benchimol.bio: Young right-back who plays for Boavista in the Portuguese top flight. He adds youthful athleticism to Cape Verde's defensive ranks.
Gilson Benchimol.playingStyle: Energetic, attack-minded right-back who looks to get forward at every opportunity
Gilson Benchimol.worldCup2026Role: Young fullback option providing squad depth and an attacking alternative at right-back
Gilson Benchimol.notableFact: One of the youngest defenders in the squad, gaining valuable experience in Portugal's Primeira Liga with Boavista

Diney Borges.bio: Young striker developing in Portugal's second division with Tondela. He represents the future of Cape Verde's attacking options with promising early performances.
Diney Borges.playingStyle: Mobile striker with good link-up play and a willingness to press from the front
Diney Borges.worldCup2026Role: Young forward squad member gaining tournament experience for future campaigns
Diney Borges.notableFact: Among the youngest attackers in the Cape Verde squad, he scored on one of his first international appearances

Logan Costa.bio: The most valuable player in the Cape Verde squad, this young center-back plays for Toulouse in Ligue 1 and has attracted attention from bigger European clubs.
Logan Costa.playingStyle: Modern, ball-playing center-back with excellent technical ability, composure on the ball, and strong one-on-one defending
Logan Costa.worldCup2026Role: Likely starting center-back and the defensive cornerstone around whom Cape Verde's World Cup backline is built
Logan Costa.notableFact: Valued at over 6 million euros, he is by far the most valuable player in the Cape Verde squad and has been linked with top European clubs

Pedro Brito.bio: Young central midfielder playing for Arouca in the Portuguese top flight. One of the newest additions to the Cape Verde setup with just 3 caps to his name.
Pedro Brito.playingStyle: Technically gifted young midfielder who looks to progress play with forward passes
Pedro Brito.worldCup2026Role: Development squad member gaining invaluable World Cup experience early in his international career
Pedro Brito.notableFact: With only 3 caps, he is the least experienced outfield player in the squad, showing the faith placed in his potential
